case_title: JAMES S. CULP VS. THE BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-24-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 REQUEST FOR RESET DUE TO INABILITY TO SERVE TRIAL OF SEP-26-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
